pi_items.source: Task description (line 5 of task.json), verifier.py line 24 (TARGET_TAG constant), and verifier.py lines 65-71 (tag verification logic)

setup_task.sh lines 29-33 creates exactly 3 cases, 2 of which have priority='High'. Task description states 'Identify ONLY the cases with High priority.' Verifier.py line 87 explicitly checks 'high_priority_hits == 2'.

setup_task.sh lines 29-33 creates exactly 1 case with priority='Low'. Task description states 'Do NOT tag the Low/Medium priority cases.' Verifier.py lines 73-79 scores low priority cases without the target tag.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates 3 synthetic test cases for Project Omega: 2 with High priority (Server Breach and Data Corruption) that require the 'expedite-review' tag, and 1 with Low priority (Routine Maintenance) that must not be tagged. The test case data is created programmatically at runtime via ArkCase API and is not from a real-world dataset.
